title: Sistema KLIP IT PLUS Food Storage Container | 5.5 L Square | Stackable & Airtight Fridge/Freezer Food Boxes with Lids | Recyclable with TerraCycle® | BPA-Free Plastic, Clear (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
KEEPS FOOD FRESHER FOR LONGER: Airtight container with Sistema easy-locking clips and flexible seal

STACKABLE & NESTABLE FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS: Modular stacking shape ensures the most efficient use of space in the pantry, fridge and freezer, plus corner shoulders on base create compact nesting when not in use
PERFECT FOR: Everyday use and pantry storage; store dried pasta, rice, cakes, muffins, bread and lots more
DIMENSIONS: L 235 mm x H 80 mm x W 170 mm
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer-safe; designed and made in New Zealand; phthalate and BPA-free
description: Organise your kitchen with the Sistema KLIP IT PLUS range. The modular stacking shapes ensure the most efficient use of space in your pantry, fridge and freezer plus corner shoulders on the base create compact nesting when not in use. Designed with a built-in airtight seal, perfect for keeping your food fresh. Simply fill the container and close the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips. Safe to use in the dishwasher (on the top rack), the microwave (without the lid), or in the fridge and freezer. Designed and Made in New Zealand. Phthalate & BPA Free.

specifications_table.Set Name: ‎KLIP IT PLUS Food Storage Container Set
